mapper.sql: select t.task_id, t.task_no, t.title, t.description, t.project_id, t.iteration_id, t.parent_id, t.task_type, t.priority, t.status, t.assignee_id, t.reporter_id, t.start_time, t.completed_at, t.estimated_hours, t.actual_hours, t.due_date, t.sort, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.deleted, t.is_subtask, t.root_id, t.deleted_by, t.deleted_at, t.deleted_reason, t.story_points, t.remaining_hours, su.nick_name as assignee_name, i.name as iteration_name from task t left join sys_user su on su.user_id = t.assignee_id left join iteration i on i.iteration_id = t.iteration_id and i.deleted = 0 where t.deleted = 0
mapper.select: and t.parent_id = #{parentId} and t.deleted = 0 order by t.sort desc
mapper.insert: insert into task (task_no, title, description, project_id, iteration_id, parent_id, task_type, priority, status, assignee_id, reporter_id, start_time, estimated_hours, due_date, sort, story_points, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_subtask, root_id) values (#{taskNo}, #{title}, #{description}, #{projectId}, #{iterationId}, #{parentId}, #{taskType}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{assigneeId}, #{reporterId}, #{startTime}, #{estimatedHours}, #{dueDate}, #{sort}, #{storyPoints}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now(), COALESCE(#{isSubtask}, 0), #{rootId})
mapper.update:
update task
task_no = #{taskNo}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, iteration_id = #{iterationId}, parent_id = #{parentId}, task_type = #{taskType}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, reporter_id = #{reporterId}, start_time = #{startTime}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, estimated_hours = #{estimatedHours}, actual_hours = #{actualHours}, due_date = #{dueDate}, sort = #{sort}, is_subtask = #{isSubtask}, root_id = #{rootId}, story_points = #{storyPoints}, remaining_hours = #{remainingHours}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where task_id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0
update task set deleted = 1, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, deleted_at = NOW() where task_id = #{taskId}
update task set deleted = 0, deleted_by = NULL, deleted_at = NULL, deleted_reason = NULL where task_id = #{taskId}
update task set deleted = 2 where task_id = #{taskId}
update task set deleted = 1, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, deleted_at = NOW() where (parent_id = #{taskId} OR root_id = #{taskId}) and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select t.task_id, t.task_no, t.title, t.description, t.project_id, t.iteration_id, t.parent_id, t.task_type, t.priority, t.status, t.assignee_id, t.reporter_id, t.start_time, t.completed_at, t.estimated_hours, t.actual_hours, t.due_date, t.sort, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.deleted, t.is_subtask, t.root_id, t.deleted_by, t.deleted_at, t.deleted_reason, t.story_points, t.remaining_hours, su.nick_name as assignee_name, i.name as iteration_name from task t left join sys_user su on su.user_id = t.assignee_id left join iteration i on i.iteration_id = t.iteration_id and i.deleted = 0 where t.root_id = #{rootId} and t.deleted = 0
select count(*) from task where parent_id = #{parentId} and deleted = 0
select max(sort) from task where project_id = #{projectId} and deleted = 0
select max(sort) from task where parent_id = #{parentId} and deleted = 0
and t.iteration_id = #{iterationId} order by t.sort desc, t.create_time desc
mapper.update: update task set iteration_id = #{toIterationId}, update_time = now() where iteration_id = #{fromIterationId} and status != 'completed' and deleted = 0
